prompt_text:
### Demographics: 48-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~20 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Tamoxifen (20 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 52.4 kg; Height 158.3 cm; BMI 20.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 122/66 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.7%; 9 months ago 6.7%; 6 months ago 6.9%; 3 months ago 7.0%; current 6.8%), FPG (12 months ago 162mg/dL; 9 months ago 157mg/dL; 6 months ago 177mg/dL; 3 months ago 144mg/dL; current 153mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 50.8kg; 9 months ago 49.1kg; 6 months ago 47.2kg; 3 months ago 51.3kg; current 52.4kg), Height (12 months ago 158.3cm; 9 months ago 158.3cm; 6 months ago 158.3cm; 3 months ago 158.3cm; current 158.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 124mmHg; 9 months ago 122mmHg; 6 months ago 123mmHg; 3 months ago 123mmHg; current 122mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 62mmHg; 9 months ago 63mmHg; 6 months ago 64mmHg; 3 months ago 64mmHg; current 66mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 9U/L; 9 months ago 13U/L; 6 months ago 14U/L; 3 months ago 7.0U/L; current 12U/L), AST (12 months ago 20U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 24U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; current 24mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 174mg/g; 9 months ago 241mg/g; 6 months ago 250mg/g; 3 months ago 257mg/g; current 197mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 87mg/dL; 9 months ago 81mg/dL; 6 months ago 80mg/dL; 3 months ago 80mg/dL; current 84mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 55mg/dL; 6 months ago 56mg/dL; 3 months ago 56mg/dL; current 57mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 137mg/dL; 9 months ago 116mg/dL; 6 months ago 115mg/dL; 3 months ago 132mg/dL; current 126mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.9g/dL; current 11.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.77 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
